title: hava' #1934
definition:
1) to come to pass, become, be
    1a) (P'al)
        1a1) to come to pass
        1a2) to come into being, arise, become, come to be
             1a2a) to let become known (with participle of knowing)
        1a3) to be
nasbUsage:
